scripts.ready: vp run check && vp run -r test && vp run -r build
scripts.dev-web: vp run -r build && concurrently -k -n core,server,cli,api,web -c blue,magenta,cyan,yellow,green "vp run @grimoire-ai/core#dev" "vp run @grimoire-ai/server#dev" "vp run @grimoire-ai/cli#dev" "node --watch-path=packages/core/dist --watch-path=packages/server/dist --watch-path=apps/cli/dist apps/cli/dist/index.mjs ui --no-open" "vp run website#dev"
